Six Pillars · One Ecosystem

Every division amplifies the others

Krishnaye Kare Inc. operates six interlocking divisions — a self-reinforcing ecosystem where immersive storytelling, phygital commerce, ethical consumer goods, experiential hospitality, and cultural licensing each strengthen the whole.

01 / SACRED MEDIA

Amethysts Of Amenti

"Entertainment becomes initiation — every experience carries the memory of the sacred."

The immersive media and transmedia storytelling arm of KKI. Flagship IP PadmaSambhava Calling — a found-footage spiritual thriller shot across Sikkim, North Bengal and Bhutan — leads a multi-property universe spanning film, XR, documentary and audio.

02 / OTT PLATFORM

AmentetTV.com

Already built. Already live.

KKI's own OTT streaming platform — the primary distribution home for all Amethysts Of Amenti content. Freemium model with subscription tiers for full series, XR companion experiences, and exclusive ritual programming.

03 / EXPERIENTIAL

Amentet Radio / Das BnB

A floating 24/7 EDM temple & canal boutique hotel.

A 19.95m UBC-certified Motortjalk vessel becomes a mobile venue for live broadcast, hospitality, and ritual gathering — generating BnB and radio revenue from day one of activation.

04 / ETHICAL GOODS

Das Royal

Signature Realms — teas, spices & sacred consumer goods.

White-label spices, sacred teas and ethical wellness goods — each product carrying a Digital Product Passport connecting it to mythic IP, XR unlockables, and verified provenance. See The Dragon Vein and The Phoenix Scroll below.

05 / PHYGITAL TECH

Das Ecosystem

Hardware, tokens & the Das Lila XR Realm.

Das Visione AR glasses, the Das Vajra Stick, and Das AURA wearables connect physical products to Das Lila — a digital-twin XR platform for sacred sites and pilgrimage trails. The $BRBE token is already deployed on Ethereum.

06 / MOBILE STUDIO

Das Caravan

The ecosystem, on the road.

A mobile production and pop-up studio vehicle — the moving base unit for on-location shoots including Off-Roads & Rituals and the European leg of Brew Riders: Paris to Arambol.

Das Royal Signature Realms

Where myth meets the leaf

Every Das Royal tea is bound to a guardian spirit and encoded with a Dragon or Phoenix Seal — a Digital Product Passport that unlocks its full origin story as a holographic scroll within Das Lila XR. Two signature realms anchor the collection.

Vietnam Edition

Teas from the Celestial Dynasties

The Dragon Vein — Vietnam

The Phoenix Scroll — Five Dynasties

Signature Products

The Digital Product Passport

Every leaf exists in two realms at once — the physical, where aroma and flavor awaken the senses, and the ethereal, within Das Lila XR, where each tea's Dragon or Phoenix Seal reveals its full mythic chronicle: soil, artisan, and guardian element, as an interactive holographic scroll.

The Launch Moment

A seven-day ride no production budget could buy

Off-Roads & Rituals — Netherlands Edition

Twelve female motorcyclists. Seven days. One winter solstice.

25 December 2026 → 1 January 2027

Twelve riders depart Den Haag on Christmas Day, travelling through winter villages and sacred landscapes across the Netherlands, arriving in Amsterdam on New Year's Day — livestreamed on AmentetTV.com and Amentet Radio as the company's symbolic public launch.
